tagline: Aapka Bharosemand Umrah aur Hajj Saathi
hero_heading: Umrah aur Hajj ka safar, mukammal itmenaan ke saath.
hero_subtext: Visa se lekar Ziyarat tak — Makkah aur Madinah ke liye trusted, transparent aur mehnati service.
about_text: Al Habib Tours 2016 se Umrah aur Hajj ke musafiron ki khidmat kar raha hai. Hamari team har group ke saath khud Makkah aur Madinah jaati hai taaki aapko sirf verified hotels, trusted transport aur ba-tajruba guides hi milein — poori transparency aur fair pricing ke saath.

testimonials.name: Mohammad Irfan
testimonials.quote: Al Habib Tours ke saath Umrah ka safar bahut hi sukoon se guzra. Hotel Haram se qareeb tha aur team ne har cheez time pe manage ki.

testimonials.name: Ayesha aur Family
testimonials.quote: Poori family ke saath gaye the, bachon ka bhi khaas khayal rakha gaya. Guide bahut madadgar the.

testimonials.name: Abdul Rasheed
testimonials.quote: Hajj ke arkaan ke dauraan team hamesha saath rahi. Mina aur Arafat ki arrangements bhi acchi thi. Allah unhe jaza de.
